originalTitle: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
content: Malema is appealing against the decision, which means he is not going to prison immediately.

originalTitle: Pope lashes out at foreigners who exploit Africa
title: Pope lashes out at foreigners who exploit Africa
content: The pontiff has been unusually forthright during his visit to conflict-hit Cameroon.

originalTitle: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
title: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
content: Keba Seba is known for opposing French influence in Africa and backing West Africa's military leaders.

originalTitle: People in Beirut wary of trusting Israel will uphold Lebanon ceasefire
title: People in Beirut wary of trusting Israel will uphold Lebanon ceasefire
content: Lebanon’s residents say they are wary of trusting that Israel will abide by the ceasefire agreement announced by Trump.

originalTitle: US panel approves Trump’s design for massive arch in Washington, DC
title: US panel approves Trump’s design for massive arch in Washington, DC
content: The proposed 76-metre arch would tower over other iconic landmarks in Washington, DC, and has attracted scrutiny.

originalTitle: Israel and Lebanon’s 10-day ceasefire goes into effect
title: Israel and Lebanon’s 10-day ceasefire goes into effect
content: A 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon has gone into effect. It began at midnight local time (21:00 GMT).

originalTitle: Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
title: Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
content: The US president invites the two countries' leaders to Washington as Israel's prime minister insists troops will not leave southern Lebanon.

originalTitle: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
content: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

originalTitle: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
content: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.

originalTitle: Champions League in the Championship? Forest's juggling act goes on
title: Champions League in the Championship? Forest's juggling act goes on
content: Nottingham Forest continue their remarkable Europa League run - but does it only increase the pressure on staying in the Premier League?

originalTitle: Spectacular European nights the new normal for Villa under Emery
title: Spectacular European nights the new normal for Villa under Emery
content: Ten years ago, Aston Villa were relegated to English football's second tier for the first time since 1987. Now they are in their second European semi-final in three seasons.

originalTitle: Why 'sensational' Palace & Conference League are good fit
title: Why 'sensational' Palace & Conference League are good fit
content: After overcoming Fiorentina over two legs to reach the semi-finals, Crystal Palace will now fancy their chances of going all the way in the Conference League and adding a European trophy to their FA Cup success last season.
